rulings.Case Title: CONS. OF JOHN J. CURTIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #16, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing despite mailing of notice of hearing of the amended petition before the filing of the amended petition and failure to describe the $435 payment to the clerk of the court on 8/25/15. (The Court presumes this was for the pleading filed on 9/8/15.) Parties must not use the Judicial Council form Proof of Service - Civil (POS-040) in this conservatorship case. The mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing - Guardianship or Conservatorship (GC-020) is the proper form of notice, on the back of which is the proper proof of service. No notice is required for a supplement to a pleading.
